name: Tziyerosarmas (Liver)
recipeInstructions:
For stuffing, skin the liver and cut it into small pieces with scissors. Place the liver in a bowl. Add rice, scallions, dill, mint, salt, and pepper; mix well.
Wash the sausage casing(s) and dip them into warm water to soften. Place the stuffing inside the casing (as you would stuff a sausage). Fold the casing carefully and place it on a buttered pan with the folded side down. Pour the melted butter over the liver. Roast in a 325°F oven for 45 minutes.
